title: Use of motor vehicle dash cameras
doc_html:
§2552. Use of motor vehicle dash cameras

            No later than January 1, 2022, any law enforcement motor vehicle that is equipped with a dash camera that has the technology to automatically record upon the activation of the motor vehicle's police emergency lights shall utilize that technology.

            Acts 2021, No. 430, §1.
doc_text:
§2552. Use of motor vehicle dash cameras
No later than January 1, 2022, any law enforcement motor vehicle that is equipped
with a dash camera that has the technology to automatically record upon the activation of the
motor vehicle's police emergency lights shall utilize that technology.
Acts 2021, No. 430, §1.
